name: webcam-capture
description: Capture images from a webcam via Windows DirectShow using OpenCV. Provides reliable snapshot capture for WSL2 environments where USBIP isochronous transfers fail.
author: DOSBot (Daniel Schott)
shortDescription: Capture webcam images, audio, and video via Windows DirectShow/WASAPI when USBIP fails in WSL2.
features: Image capture: JPEG 640x480 via OpenCV DirectShow
Audio recording: WAV 44.1kHz PCM via PyAudio/WASAPI
Video recording: MP4 H.264+AAC via ffmpeg DirectShow
Wake word listener: voice-activated photo with 'DOSBot' trigger
Saves to C:\Users\Public\ accessible from WSL2
Brio 100 webcam + mic in one device
